summary: Vertical video. A Fox News split-screen interview between Dana Perino and DHS Spokeswoman Tricia McLaughlin discussing the case of an immigrant soccer coach who is in the United States illegally and is charged with the murder of a 13-year-old boy, and discussing sanctuary city policies, with an inset LAPD mugshot. It is a talking-head news interview. On-screen text reads 'TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS SPOKESWOMAN', 'ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED WITH TEEN'S MURDER IN CA', and 'FOX NEWS ALERT'.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS SPOKESWOMAN; ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED WITH TEEN'S MURDER IN CA; FOX NEWS ALERT
